instruction: Create a user document template at ~/Templates/meeting_minutes.txt containing exactly these three lines: Meeting Title:, Attendees:, Action Items:. Also create ~/Desktop/template_status.txt containing exactly template=meeting_minutes.txt.
source: 外部参考来源：Ubuntu Desktop Guide - Create a document template (https://help.ubuntu.com/lts/ubuntu-help/files-templates.html.en)

result.command:
expected_tpl=$(printf 'Meeting Title:
Attendees:
Action Items:
'); actual_tpl=$(cat ~/Templates/meeting_minutes.txt 2>/dev/null); template_ok='false'; [ "$actual_tpl" = "$expected_tpl" ] && template_ok='true'; status=$(cat ~/Desktop/template_status.txt 2>/dev/null); status_ok='false'; [ "$status" = 'template=meeting_minutes.txt' ] && status_ok='true'; echo "template_ok=$template_ok"; echo "status_ok=$status_ok"
